rules.heading: Rules
rules.scoringIntro: Each match prediction is scored against the 90-minute result — extra time and penalties do not change your points.
rules.scoringExactBody: Exact score (e.g. you predicted 2-1 and the match ended 2-1).
rules.scoringDiffBody: Correct goal difference, non-zero (e.g. you predicted 2-1 and the match ended 3-2).
rules.scoringWinnerBody: Correct winner or correct draw (e.g. you predicted 1-0 for a 2-1 match, or you predicted 1-1 for a 2-2 match).
rules.scoringFootnote: Knockout matches: only the 90-minute score counts.
rules.propsBody: Before the opening kickoff you answer 5 tournament-level questions — winner, runner-up, third place, Golden Boot (top scorer), and Golden Ball (best player). Each has its own point value (4 to 10).
rules.lockingMatches: Each match prediction locks at that match's kickoff. After kickoff, you can't change it — and everyone else can see what you picked.
rules.lockingProps: Pre-tournament questions all lock together at the opening kickoff (June 11, 19:00 UTC). After lock you can still see your own answers but you can't edit them.
rules.lockingReveal: Match picks become visible to all family members at kickoff. Pre-tournament answers stay private — admin enters the correct answer once the tournament resolves each question.
rules.bracketBody: The bracket is read-only — it fills in automatically as the admin enters knockout results. No bracket picks are scored this year.
rules.tiebreakBody: If two players have the same total: (1) more exact scores wins; (2) then more correct pre-tournament answers; (3) then alphabetical by display name.

howToPlay.heading: How to play
howToPlay.intro: A 60-second walkthrough — bookmark it if you want to come back later.
howToPlay.step1Body: The code came from the family WhatsApp group. Pick a display name (2-24 letters). You can switch language any time from the pill in the top corner.
howToPlay.step2Body: Tap a match on the Matches tab and enter the score. It saves automatically. Once kickoff hits, your pick locks and everyone can see it.
howToPlay.step3Body: Open More → Pre-tournament props and answer all 10. They all lock together at the opening kickoff (June 11).
howToPlay.step4Body: Points appear automatically once the admin enters each result. Tap a row to see that person's score breakdown.
howToPlay.step5Body: Your profile, the bracket, the rules, and this walkthrough all live under the More tab. Logout is there too.
howToPlay.outro: Questions? Argue about them at dinner.
